历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3706 → 3338 → 4593 → 5409 → 5573, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2235 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5573; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 29 → 28 → 27 → 28 → 31, expanding to 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, a reduction of about 19.4% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 29th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 28–31 range in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; no negative public opinion about East China Normal University appeared in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin popularity total ranking 28th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.7 million, with moderately high application attention; no historical abnormal admission records; 14 A- or above disciplines including A+ in Education, A+ in Statistics, A in Software Engineering, A in Mathematics, A in Psychology, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Data Science continues to heat up; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 365,000, a slight increase from 2025 (363,000); the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, with the competitive environment continuing to tighten; East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Hebei examinees; the school's enrollment scale in Hebei Province is moderate, with no special regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the approximately 19.4% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (easing competition), a slight increase in provincial examinees, and the upward trend of the provincial control line (intensifying competition), but the expansion of examinee numbers and the continuous rise of the provincial control line offset each other; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 4956, with a range of 4456–5456.
